description: Contract-aware layout geometry rules. Symmetry is enforced only when the layout declares it.

SP-C01.name: Still Paper Editorial Cover
SP-C01.description: SP-C01 is a symmetric editorial cover. Main zones should share the same left/right inset.

SP-MF-R01.name: Still Paper Mist Field Field Photo Cover
SP-MF-R01.description: SP-MF-R01 follows board 01: a quiet title block and an image area carrying the lower half. Zones are freeform but must stay inside the 1080px poster.

SP-MF-R01B.name: Still Paper Mist Field Field Photo Journal
SP-MF-R01B.description: SP-MF-R01B preserves the R01 derivative layout: large editorial title, centered photo well, bottom journal note, stamp, and footer metadata. It is not a replacement for the source-board R01 lower-half image structure.

SP-MF-R02.name: Still Paper Mist Field Full Photo Thesis
SP-MF-R02.description: SP-MF-R02 follows board 01: a full-bleed mist mountain photo, upper-left editorial title in a quiet zone, and low-voice bottom metadata. Zones are freeform but must stay inside the 1080px poster.

SP-MF-R03.name: Still Paper Mist Field Object Observation
SP-MF-R03.description: SP-MF-R03 follows board 01: a quiet paper observation card with low-voice text on the left and a botanical object cutout on the right. Zones are freeform but must stay inside the 1080px poster.

SP-MF-R04.name: Still Paper Mist Field Night Lake Note
SP-MF-R04.description: SP-MF-R04 follows board 01: a full-bleed dark lake image with quiet white note text, top meta, bottom place/time strip, and a short right anchor line. Zones are freeform but must stay inside the 1080px poster.

SP-MF-R05.name: Still Paper Mist Field Daily Record
SP-MF-R05.description: SP-MF-R05 follows board 01: a quiet paper daily record card with title, icon rows, stamp, and closing line. Zones are freeform but must stay inside the 1080px poster.

SP-MF-R06.name: Still Paper Mist Field Quote Photo
SP-MF-R06.description: SP-MF-R06 follows the current user-corrected proof target: a full-bleed vertical travel image with quote, meta, date, stylized quote mark, and anchor over quiet mist zones. Zones are freeform but must stay inside the 1080px poster.

SP-MF-R07.name: Still Paper Mist Field Essay Split
SP-MF-R07.description: SP-MF-R07 follows board 01: left essay text and a right vertical image strip. Zones are freeform but must stay inside the 1080px poster.

SP-MF-R08.name: Still Paper Mist Field Gear List
SP-MF-R08.description: SP-MF-R08 follows board 01: a quiet paper gear checklist. Title, list, and closing note are freeform but must stay inside the 1080px poster.

SP-C03.name: Still Paper Image-Led Note
SP-C03.description: Image-led layouts may have different title-card geometry but the image and footer zones still follow declared bounds.

SP-E05.name: Still Paper Moodboard Story
SP-E05.description: Moodboard layouts allow irregular internal collage placement, but footer and poster bounds must stay safe.

SL-C02.name: Signal Proof Screenshot Proof
SL-C02.description: Screenshot proof layouts are intentionally asymmetric: large screenshot left, callouts right.
